title: Analytic solution of the Boltzmann equation in an expanding system
author_string: D. Bazow, G. S. Denicol, U. Heinz, M. Martinez, J. Noronha
abstract: For a massless gas with constant cross section in a homogeneous, isotropically expanding spacetime we reformulate the relativistic Boltzmann equation as a set of non-linear coupled moment equations. For a particular initial condition this set can be solved exactly, yielding the first analytical solution of the Boltzmann equation for an expanding system. The non-equilibrium behavior of this relativistic gas can be mapped onto that of a homogeneous, static non-relativistic gas of Maxwell molecules.
comment: 5 pages, 1 figure; minor changes, accepted for publication in Phys. Rev. Lett
